theme: one compiled plan serving eight analysts' queries
title: Shared Sub-Plan Compiler: One Circuit for Eight Analysts
strategies: trivial: naive per-query, per-monomial plan (reproduces the op-count baseline)
greedy: global common-subexpression elimination on the expanded monomials x_i*x_j
strong: recover the shared linear-form subspace common to all queries; compute F forms + their O(F^2) products once, then read each query off cheaply
